regional_cost_note: Excavation in Whangārei typically costs $185–$230/hr with operator, $38–$70/m³ disposed for a site cut, and $900–$3,500 for foundation excavation. Northland rates are broadly in line with the national average, with some capacity constraints for specialist trades. Confirm spoil disposal is included — tipping fees and cartage can add significantly to the cost.
